SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2015 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOVAS, EDWARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FISHMAN, RICKY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
